text.title: Prompt Portability Audit Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 23-prompt support-bot suite audit before Claude→OpenAI dual-stack migration.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: pre-migration audit for support-bot suite.

Step 2. Scan hits: 12 prompts use `<thinking>` Claude tag; 8 use OpenAI `developer` role (some are dual); 3 use Gemini safety markers; 1 uses Anthropic-specific refusal format `I can't help with that`.

Step 3. Severity assigned: `claude-xml-thinking-tag` → high (breaks on OpenAI), `openai-developer-role` → medium (Claude accepts in system), `gemini-safety-marker` → medium, `claude-refusal-format` → low (cosmetic). Owners: viktoria@faion.net + ruslan@faion.net. Deadline: 2026-07-01.
Result. Report committed; consumed by `prompt-portability-across-providers` to produce the migration spec.
